describe.description: Creates a screen reader-accessible description of the canvas.

describeElement.signature: describeElement(name: String, text: String, display?: Constant)
describeElement.description: Creates a screen reader-accessible description of elements in the canvas.
describeElement.example: describeElement('Circle', 'A yellow circle in the top-left corner.')

textOutput.description: Creates a screen reader-accessible description of shapes on the canvas.

gridOutput.description: Creates a screen reader-accessible description of shapes on the canvas.

alpha.description: Gets the alpha (transparency) value of a color.

blue.description: Gets the blue value of a color.

brightness.description: Gets the brightness value of a color.

green.description: Gets the green value of a color.

hue.description: Gets the hue value of a color.

lerpColor.signature: lerpColor(c1: p5.Color, c2: p5.Color, amt: Number)
lerpColor.description: Blends two colors to find a third color between them.

paletteLerp.description: Blends multiple colors to find a color between them.

lightness.description: Gets the lightness value of a color.

red.description: Gets the red value of a color.

saturation.description: Gets the saturation value of a color.

beginClip.description: Starts defining a shape that will mask any shapes drawn afterward.

endClip.description: Ends defining a mask that was started with beginClip().

clip.description: Defines a shape that will mask any shapes drawn afterward.

background.description: Sets the color used for the background of the canvas.

clear.signature: clear(r?: Number, g?: Number, b?: Number, a?: Number)
clear.description: Clears the pixels on the canvas.

colorMode.description: Changes the way color values are interpreted.

fill.signature: fill(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, alpha?: Number)
fill.description: Sets the color used to fill shapes.

noFill.description: Disables setting the fill color for shapes.

noStroke.description: Disables drawing points, lines, and the outlines of shapes.

stroke.signature: stroke(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, alpha?: Number)
stroke.description: Sets the color used to draw points, lines, and the outlines of shapes.

erase.description: Starts using shapes to erase parts of the canvas.

noErase.description: Ends erasing that was started with erase().

arc.signature: arc(x: Number, y: Number, w: Number, h: Number, start: Number, stop: Number, mode?: Constant, detail?: Integer)

ellipse.signature: ellipse(x: Number, y: Number, w: Number, h?: Number)

circle.signature: circle(x: Number, y: Number, d: Number)

line.signature: line(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number)
line.description: Draws a straight line between two points.

point.signature: point(x: Number, y: Number, z?: Number)
point.description: Draws a single point in space.

quad.signature: quad(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number, x4: Number, y4: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

rect.signature: rect(x: Number, y: Number, w: Number, h?: Number, tl?: Number, tr?: Number, br?: Number, bl?: Number)

square.signature: square(x: Number, y: Number, s: Number, tl?: Number, tr?: Number, br?: Number, bl?: Number)

triangle.signature: triangle(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number)

ellipseMode.description: Changes where ellipses, circles, and arcs are drawn.

noSmooth.description: Draws certain features with jagged (aliased) edges.

rectMode.description: Changes where rectangles and squares are drawn.

smooth.description: Draws certain features with smooth (antialiased) edges.

strokeCap.description: Sets the style for rendering the ends of lines.

strokeJoin.description: Sets the style of the joints that connect line segments.

strokeWeight.description: Sets the width of the stroke used for points, lines, and the outlines of shapes.

bezier.signature: bezier(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number, x4: Number, y4: Number)

bezierDetail.description: Sets the number of segments used to draw Bézier curves in WebGL mode.

bezierPoint.signature: bezierPoint(a: Number, b: Number, c: Number, d: Number, t: Number)
bezierPoint.description: Calculates coordinates along a Bézier curve using interpolation.
bezierPoint.example: let x = bezierPoint(x1, x2, x3, x4, 0)

bezierTangent.signature: bezierTangent(a: Number, b: Number, c: Number, d: Number, t: Number)
bezierTangent.description: Calculates coordinates along a line that's tangent to a Bézier curve.
bezierTangent.example: let tx = 0.1 * bezierTangent(x1, x2, x3, x4, 0)

curve.signature: curve(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number, x4: Number, y4: Number)
curve.description: Draws a curve using a Catmull-Rom spline.

curveDetail.description: Sets the number of segments used to draw spline curves in WebGL mode.

curveTightness.description: Adjusts the way curve() and curveVertex() draw.

curvePoint.signature: curvePoint(a: Number, b: Number, c: Number, d: Number, t: Number)
curvePoint.description: Calculates coordinates along a spline curve using interpolation.
curvePoint.example: let x = curvePoint(x1, x2, x3, x4, 0)

curveTangent.signature: curveTangent(a: Number, b: Number, c: Number, d: Number, t: Number)
curveTangent.description: Calculates coordinates along a line that's tangent to a spline curve.
curveTangent.example: let tx = 0.2 * curveTangent(x1, x2, x3, x4, 0)

beginContour.description: Begins creating a hole within a flat shape.

beginShape.description: Begins adding vertices to a custom shape.

bezierVertex.signature: bezierVertex(x2: Number, y2: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number, x4: Number, y4: Number)
bezierVertex.description: Adds a Bézier curve segment to a custom shape.

curveVertex.description: Adds a spline curve segment to a custom shape.

endContour.description: Stops creating a hole within a flat shape.

endShape.description: Stops adding vertices to a custom shape.

quadraticVertex.signature: quadraticVertex(cx: Number, cy: Number, x3: Number, y3: Number)
quadraticVertex.description: Adds a quadratic Bézier curve segment to a custom shape.

vertex.description: Adds a vertex to a custom shape.

normal.description: Sets the normal vector for vertices in a custom 3D shape.

WEBGL.description: One of the two render modes in p5.

WEBGL2.description: One of the two possible values of a WebGL canvas (either WEBGL or WEBGL2), which can be used to determine what capabilities the rendering environment has.

DEGREES.description: A `String` constant that's used to set the angleMode().

RADIANS.description: A `String` constant that's used to set the angleMode().

HSB.description: HSB (hue, saturation, brightness) is a type of color model.

AUTO.description: AUTO allows us to automatically set the width or height of an element (but not both), based on the current height and width of the element.

print.description: Displays text in the web browser's console.

frameCount.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the number of frames drawn since the sketch started.

deltaTime.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the number of milliseconds it took to draw the last frame.

focused.description: A `Boolean` variable that's `true` if the browser is focused and `false` if not.

cursor.signature: cursor(type: String|Constant, x?: Number, y?: Number)

frameRate.description: Sets the number of frames to draw per second.

webglVersion.description: A `String` variable with the WebGL version in use.

displayWidth.description: A `Number` variable that stores the width of the screen display.

displayHeight.description: A `Number` variable that stores the height of the screen display.

windowWidth.description: A `Number` variable that stores the width of the browser's viewport.

windowHeight.description: A `Number` variable that stores the height of the browser's viewport.

windowResized.description: A function that's called when the browser window is resized.

width.description: A `Number` variable that stores the width of the canvas in pixels.

height.description: A `Number` variable that stores the height of the canvas in pixels.

fullscreen.description: Toggles full-screen mode or returns the current mode.

pixelDensity.description: Sets the pixel density or returns the current density.

displayDensity.description: Returns the display's current pixel density.

getURL.description: Returns the sketch's current URL as a `String`.

getURLPath.description: Returns the current URL path as an `Array` of `String`s.

getURLParams.description: Returns the current URL parameters in an `Object`.

preload.description: A function that's called once to load assets before the sketch runs.

setup.description: A function that's called once when the sketch begins running.

draw.description: A function that's called repeatedly while the sketch runs.

remove.description: Removes the sketch from the web page.

disableFriendlyErrors.description: Turns off the parts of the Friendly Error System (FES) that impact performance.

if.description: A way to choose whether to run a block of code.

Number.description: A number that can be positive, negative, or zero.

Object.description: A container for data that's stored as key-value pairs.

Array.description: A list that keeps several pieces of data in order.

class.description: A template for creating objects of a particular type.

for.description: A way to repeat a block of code when the number of iterations is known.

while.description: A way to repeat a block of code.

console.description: Prints a message to the web browser's console.

createCanvas.signature: createCanvas(width?: Number, height?: Number, renderer?: Constant, canvas?: HTMLCanvasElement)
createCanvas.description: Creates a canvas element on the web page.

resizeCanvas.signature: resizeCanvas(width: Number, height: Number, noRedraw?: Boolean)
resizeCanvas.description: Resizes the canvas to a given width and height.

createGraphics.signature: createGraphics(width: Number, height: Number, renderer?: Constant, canvas?: HTMLCanvasElement)

clearDepth.description: Clears the depth buffer in WebGL mode.

blendMode.description: Sets the way colors blend when added to the canvas.

drawingContext.description: A system variable that provides direct access to the sketch's `<canvas>` element.

noLoop.description: Stops the code in draw() from running repeatedly.

loop.description: Resumes the draw loop after noLoop() has been called.

isLooping.description: Returns `true` if the draw loop is running and `false` if not.

push.description: Begins a drawing group that contains its own styles and transformations.

pop.description: Ends a drawing group that contains its own styles and transformations.

redraw.description: Runs the code in draw() once.

p5.description: Creates a new sketch in "instance" mode.

applyMatrix.description: Applies a transformation matrix to the coordinate system.

resetMatrix.description: Clears all transformations applied to the coordinate system.

rotateX.description: Rotates the coordinate system about the x-axis in WebGL mode.

rotateY.description: Rotates the coordinate system about the y-axis in WebGL mode.

rotateZ.description: Rotates the coordinate system about the z-axis in WebGL mode.

scale.signature: scale(s: Number|p5.Vector|Number[], y?: Number, z?: Number)

shearX.description: Shears the x-axis so that shapes appear skewed.

shearY.description: Shears the y-axis so that shapes appear skewed.

translate.signature: translate(x: Number, y: Number, z?: Number)

storeItem.description: Stores a value in the web browser's local storage.

getItem.description: Returns a value in the web browser's local storage.

clearStorage.description: Removes all items in the web browser's local storage.

removeItem.description: Removes an item from the web browser's local storage.

createStringDict.description: Creates a new instance of p5.

createNumberDict.description: Creates a new instance of p5.

select.description: Searches the page for the first element that matches the given CSS selector string.

selectAll.description: Searches the page for all elements that matches the given CSS selector string.

removeElements.description: Removes all elements created by p5.

changed.description: Calls a function when the element changes.

input.description: Calls a function when the element receives input.

createP.example: let p = createP('Tell me a story.')

createImg.description: Creates an `<img>` element that can appear outside of the canvas.

createA.signature: createA(href: String, html: String, target?: String)
createA.description: Creates an `<a></a>` element that links to another web page.

createSlider.signature: createSlider(min: Number, max: Number, value?: Number, step?: Number)

createVideo.description: Creates a `<video>` element for simple audio/video playback.

createAudio.description: Creates a hidden `<audio>` element for simple audio playback.

createCapture.signature: createCapture(type?: String|Constant|Object, flipped?: Object, callback?: Function)
createCapture.description: Creates a `<video>` element that "captures" the audio/video stream from the webcam and microphone.

deviceOrientation.description: The system variable deviceOrientation always contains the orientation of the device.

accelerationX.description: The system variable accelerationX always contains the acceleration of the device along the x axis.

accelerationY.description: The system variable accelerationY always contains the acceleration of the device along the y axis.

accelerationZ.description: The system variable accelerationZ always contains the acceleration of the device along the z axis.

pAccelerationX.description: The system variable pAccelerationX always contains the acceleration of the device along the x axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

pAccelerationY.description: The system variable pAccelerationY always contains the acceleration of the device along the y axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

pAccelerationZ.description: The system variable pAccelerationZ always contains the acceleration of the device along the z axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

rotationX.description: The system variable rotationX always contains the rotation of the device along the x axis.

rotationY.description: The system variable rotationY always contains the rotation of the device along the y axis.

rotationZ.description: The system variable rotationZ always contains the rotation of the device along the z axis.

pRotationX.description: The system variable pRotationX always contains the rotation of the device along the x axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

pRotationY.description: The system variable pRotationY always contains the rotation of the device along the y axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

pRotationZ.description: The system variable pRotationZ always contains the rotation of the device along the z axis in the frame previous to the current frame.

turnAxis.description: When a device is rotated, the axis that triggers the deviceTurned() method is stored in the turnAxis variable.

setMoveThreshold.description: The setMoveThreshold() function is used to set the movement threshold for the deviceMoved() function.

setShakeThreshold.description: The setShakeThreshold() function is used to set the movement threshold for the deviceShaken() function.

deviceMoved.description: The deviceMoved() function is called when the device is moved by more than the threshold value along X, Y or Z axis.

deviceTurned.description: The deviceTurned() function is called when the device rotates by more than 90 degrees continuously.

deviceShaken.description: The deviceShaken() function is called when the device total acceleration changes of accelerationX and accelerationY values is more than the threshold value.

keyIsPressed.description: A `Boolean` system variable that's `true` if any key is currently pressed and `false` if not.

key.description: A `String` system variable that contains the value of the last key typed.

keyCode.description: A `Number` system variable that contains the code of the last key typed.

keyPressed.description: A function that's called once when any key is pressed.

keyReleased.description: A function that's called once when any key is released.

keyTyped.description: A function that's called once when keys with printable characters are pressed.

keyIsDown.description: Returns `true` if the key it’s checking is pressed and `false` if not.

movedX.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's horizontal movement.

movedY.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's vertical movement.

mouseX.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's horizontal position.

mouseY.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's vertical position.

pmouseX.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's previous horizontal position.

pmouseY.description: A `Number` system variable that tracks the mouse's previous vertical position.

winMouseX.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the mouse's horizontal position within the browser.

winMouseY.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the mouse's vertical position within the browser.

pwinMouseX.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the mouse's previous horizontal position within the browser.

pwinMouseY.description: A `Number` variable that tracks the mouse's previous vertical position within the browser.

mouseButton.description: A String system variable that contains the value of the last mouse button pressed.

mouseIsPressed.description: A `Boolean` system variable that's `true` if the mouse is pressed and `false` if not.

mouseMoved.description: A function that's called when the mouse moves.

mouseDragged.description: A function that's called when the mouse moves while a button is pressed.

mousePressed.description: A function that's called once when a mouse button is pressed.

mouseReleased.description: A function that's called once when a mouse button is released.

mouseClicked.description: A function that's called once after a mouse button is pressed and released.

doubleClicked.description: A function that's called once when a mouse button is clicked twice quickly.

mouseWheel.description: A function that's called once when the mouse wheel moves.

requestPointerLock.description: Locks the mouse pointer to its current position and makes it invisible.

exitPointerLock.description: Exits a pointer lock started with requestPointerLock.

touches.description: An `Array` of all the current touch points on a touchscreen device.

touchStarted.description: A function that's called once each time the user touches the screen.

touchMoved.description: A function that's called when the user touches the screen and moves.

touchEnded.description: A function that's called once each time a screen touch ends.

saveCanvas.description: Saves the current canvas as an image.

saveFrames.signature: saveFrames(filename: String, extension: String, duration: Number, framerate: Number, callback?: Function(Array))
saveFrames.description: Captures a sequence of frames from the canvas that can be saved as images.

loadImage.signature: loadImage(path: String, successCallback?: function(p5.Image), failureCallback?: Function(Event))
loadImage.description: Loads an image to create a p5.

saveGif.signature: saveGif(filename: String, duration: Number, options?: Object)
saveGif.description: Generates a gif from a sketch and saves it to a file.

image.signature: image(img: p5.Image|p5.Element|p5.Texture|p5.Framebuffer|p5.FramebufferTexture, x: Number, y: Number, width?: Number, height?: Number)
image.description: Draws an image to the canvas.

tint.signature: tint(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, alpha?: Number)

noTint.description: Removes the current tint set by tint().

imageMode.description: Changes the location from which images are drawn when image() is called.

pixels.description: An array containing the color of each pixel on the canvas.

blend.signature: blend(srcImage: p5.Image, sx: Integer, sy: Integer, sw: Integer, sh: Integer, dx: Integer, dy: Integer, dw: Integer, dh: Integer, blendMode: Constant)
blend.description: Copies a region of pixels from one image to another.

copy.signature: copy(srcImage: p5.Image|p5.Element, sx: Integer, sy: Integer, sw: Integer, sh: Integer, dx: Integer, dy: Integer, dw: Integer, dh: Integer)
copy.description: Copies pixels from a source image to a region of the canvas.

filter.signature: filter(filterType: Constant, filterParam?: Number, useWebGL?: Boolean)
filter.description: Applies an image filter to the canvas.

get.signature: get(x: Number, y: Number, w: Number, h: Number)
get.description: Gets a pixel or a region of pixels from the canvas.

loadPixels.description: Loads the current value of each pixel on the canvas into the pixels array.

set.signature: set(x: Number, y: Number, c: Number|Number[]|Object)
set.description: Sets the color of a pixel or draws an image to the canvas.

updatePixels.signature: updatePixels(x?: Number, y?: Number, w?: Number, h?: Number)
updatePixels.description: Updates the canvas with the RGBA values in the pixels array.

loadJSON.signature: loadJSON(path: String, successCallback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
loadJSON.description: Loads a JSON file to create an `Object`.

loadStrings.signature: loadStrings(path: String, successCallback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
loadStrings.description: Loads a text file to create an `Array`.

loadTable.signature: loadTable(filename: String, extension?: String, header?: String, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
loadTable.description: Reads the contents of a file or URL and creates a p5.

loadXML.signature: loadXML(path: String, successCallback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
loadXML.description: Loads an XML file to create a p5.

loadBytes.signature: loadBytes(file: String, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
loadBytes.description: This method is suitable for fetching files up to size of 64MB.

httpGet.signature: httpGet(path: String, datatype?: String, data?: Object|Boolean, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
httpGet.description: Method for executing an HTTP GET request.

httpPost.signature: httpPost(path: String, datatype?: String, data?: Object|Boolean, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
httpPost.description: Method for executing an HTTP POST request.

httpDo.signature: httpDo(path: String, method?: String, datatype?: String, data?: Object, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)
httpDo.description: Method for executing an HTTP request.

save.signature: save(objectOrFilename?: Object|String, filename?: String, options?: Boolean|String)
save.description: Saves a given element(image, text, json, csv, wav, or html) to the client's computer.

saveJSON.signature: saveJSON(json: Array|Object, filename: String, optimize?: Boolean)
saveJSON.description: Saves an `Object` or `Array` to a JSON file.

saveStrings.signature: saveStrings(list: String[], filename: String, extension?: String, isCRLF?: Boolean)
saveStrings.description: Saves an `Array` of `String`s to a file, one per line.

saveTable.signature: saveTable(Table: p5.Table, filename: String, options?: String)
saveTable.description: Writes the contents of a Table object to a file.

abs.description: Calculates the absolute value of a number.

ceil.description: Calculates the closest integer value that is greater than or equal to a number.

constrain.signature: constrain(n: Number, low: Number, high: Number)
constrain.description: Constrains a number between a minimum and maximum value.

dist.signature: dist(x1: Number, y1: Number, x2: Number, y2: Number)
dist.description: Calculates the distance between two points.
dist.example: let d = dist(x1, y1, x2, y2)

exp.description: Calculates the value of Euler's number e (2.

floor.description: Calculates the closest integer value that is less than or equal to the value of a number.

lerp.signature: lerp(start: Number, stop: Number, amt: Number)
lerp.description: Calculates a number between two numbers at a specific increment.

log.description: Calculates the natural logarithm (the base-e logarithm) of a number.

mag.description: Calculates the magnitude, or length, of a vector.

map.signature: map(value: Number, start1: Number, stop1: Number, start2: Number, stop2: Number, withinBounds?: Boolean)
map.description: Re-maps a number from one range to another.

max.description: Returns the largest value in a sequence of numbers.

min.description: Returns the smallest value in a sequence of numbers.

norm.signature: norm(value: Number, start: Number, stop: Number)
norm.description: Maps a number from one range to a value between 0 and 1.

round.description: Calculates the integer closest to a number.

sq.description: Calculates the square of a number.

sqrt.description: Calculates the square root of a number.

fract.description: Calculates the fractional part of a number.

createVector.signature: createVector(x?: Number, y?: Number, z?: Number)

noise.signature: noise(x: Number, y?: Number, z?: Number)
noise.description: Returns random numbers that can be tuned to feel organic.

noiseDetail.description: Adjusts the character of the noise produced by the noise() function.

noiseSeed.description: Sets the seed value for the noise() function.

randomSeed.description: Sets the seed value for the random() and randomGaussian() functions.

random.description: Returns a random number or a random element from an array.

randomGaussian.description: Returns a random number fitting a Gaussian, or normal, distribution.

acos.description: Calculates the arc cosine of a number.

asin.description: Calculates the arc sine of a number.

atan.description: Calculates the arc tangent of a number.

atan2.description: Calculates the angle formed by a point, the origin, and the positive x-axis.

cos.description: Calculates the cosine of an angle.

sin.description: Calculates the sine of an angle.

tan.description: Calculates the tangent of an angle.

degrees.description: Converts an angle measured in radians to its value in degrees.

radians.description: Converts an angle measured in degrees to its value in radians.

angleMode.description: Changes the unit system used to measure angles.

textAlign.description: Sets the way text is aligned when text() is called.

textLeading.description: Sets the spacing between lines of text when text() is called.

textSize.description: Sets the font size when text() is called.

textStyle.description: Sets the style for system fonts when text() is called.

textWidth.description: Calculates the maximum width of a string of text drawn when text() is called.

textAscent.description: Calculates the ascent of the current font at its current size.

textDescent.description: Calculates the descent of the current font at its current size.

textWrap.description: Sets the style for wrapping text when text() is called.

loadFont.signature: loadFont(path: String, successCallback?: Function, failureCallback?: Function)
loadFont.description: Loads a font and creates a p5.

text.signature: text(str: String|Object|Array|Number|Boolean, x: Number, y: Number, maxWidth?: Number, maxHeight?: Number)

textFont.description: Sets the font used by the text() function.

append.description: Adds a value to the end of an array.

arrayCopy.signature: arrayCopy(src: Array, srcPosition: Integer, dst: Array, dstPosition: Integer, length: Integer)
arrayCopy.description: Copies an array (or part of an array) to another array.

concat.description: Concatenates two arrays, maps to Array.

reverse.description: Reverses the order of an array, maps to Array.

shorten.description: Decreases an array by one element and returns the shortened array, maps to Array.

shuffle.description: Shuffles the elements of an array.

sort.description: Sorts an array of numbers from smallest to largest, or puts an array of words in alphabetical order.

splice.signature: splice(list: Array, value: Any, position: Integer)
splice.description: Inserts a value or an array of values into an existing array.

subset.signature: subset(list: Array, start: Integer, count?: Integer)
subset.description: Extracts an array of elements from an existing array.

float.description: Converts a `String` to a floating point (decimal) `Number`.

int.description: Converts a `Boolean`, `String`, or decimal `Number` to an integer.

byte.description: Converts a `Boolean`, `String`, or `Number` to its byte value.

char.description: Converts a `Number` or `String` to a single-character `String`.

hex.description: Converts a `Number` to a `String` with its hexadecimal value.

unhex.description: Converts a `String` with a hexadecimal value to a `Number`.

join.description: Combines an array of strings into one string.

match.description: Applies a regular expression to a string and returns an array with the first match.

matchAll.description: Applies a regular expression to a string and returns an array of matches.

nf.signature: nf(num: Number|String, left?: Integer|String, right?: Integer|String)
nf.description: Converts a `Number` into a `String` with a given number of digits.

nfc.description: Converts a `Number` into a `String` with commas to mark units of 1,000.

nfp.signature: nfp(num: Number, left?: Integer, right?: Integer)
nfp.description: Converts a `Number` into a `String` with a plus or minus sign.

nfs.signature: nfs(num: Number, left?: Integer, right?: Integer)
nfs.description: Converts a positive `Number` into a `String` with an extra space in front.

split.description: Splits a `String` into pieces and returns an array containing the pieces.

splitTokens.description: Splits a `String` into pieces and returns an array containing the pieces.

trim.description: Removes whitespace from the start and end of a `String` without changing the middle.

day.description: Returns the current day as a number from 1–31.

hour.description: Returns the current hour as a number from 0–23.

minute.description: Returns the current minute as a number from 0–59.

millis.description: Returns the number of milliseconds since a sketch started running.

month.description: Returns the current month as a number from 1–12.

second.description: Returns the current second as a number from 0–59.

year.description: Returns the current year as a number such as 1999.

beginGeometry.description: Begins adding shapes to a new p5.

endGeometry.description: Stops adding shapes to a new p5.

plane.signature: plane(width?: Number, height?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

box.signature: box(width?: Number, height?: Number, depth?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

sphere.signature: sphere(radius?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

cylinder.signature: cylinder(radius?: Number, height?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer, bottomCap?: Boolean, topCap?: Boolean)

cone.signature: cone(radius?: Number, height?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer, cap?: Boolean)

ellipsoid.signature: ellipsoid(radiusX?: Number, radiusY?: Number, radiusZ?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

torus.signature: torus(radius?: Number, tubeRadius?: Number, detailX?: Integer, detailY?: Integer)

orbitControl.signature: orbitControl(sensitivityX?: Number, sensitivityY?: Number, sensitivityZ?: Number, options?: Object)
orbitControl.description: Allows the user to orbit around a 3D sketch using a mouse, trackpad, or touchscreen.

debugMode.description: Adds a grid and an axes icon to clarify orientation in 3D sketches.

noDebugMode.description: Turns off debugMode() in a 3D sketch.

ambientLight.signature: ambientLight(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, alpha?: Number)
ambientLight.description: Creates a light that shines from all directions.

specularColor.signature: specularColor(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number)
specularColor.description: Sets the specular color for lights.

directionalLight.signature: directionalLight(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, x: Number, y: Number, z: Number)
directionalLight.description: Creates a light that shines in one direction.

pointLight.signature: pointLight(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, x: Number, y: Number, z: Number)
pointLight.description: Creates a light that shines from a point in all directions.

imageLight.description: Creates an ambient light from an image.

lights.description: Places an ambient and directional light in the scene.

lightFalloff.signature: lightFalloff(constant: Number, linear: Number, quadratic: Number)
lightFalloff.description: Sets the falloff rate for pointLight() and spotLight().

spotLight.signature: spotLight(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, x: Number, y: Number, z: Number, rx: Number, ry: Number, rz: Number, angle?: Number, concentration?: Number)
spotLight.description: Creates a light that shines from a point in one direction.

noLights.description: Removes all lights from the sketch.

loadModel.signature: loadModel(path: String, normalize: Boolean, successCallback?: function(p5.Geometry), failureCallback?: Function(Event), fileType?: String)
loadModel.description: Loads a 3D model to create a p5.

createModel.signature: createModel(modelString: String, fileType?: String, normalize: Boolean, successCallback?: function(p5.Geometry), failureCallback?: Function(Event))
createModel.description: Load a 3d model from an OBJ or STL string.

loadShader.signature: loadShader(vertFilename: String, fragFilename: String, successCallback?: Function, failureCallback?: Function)
loadShader.description: Loads vertex and fragment shaders to create a p5.

createShader.signature: createShader(vertSrc: String, fragSrc: String, options?: Object)

baseMaterialShader.description: Get the default shader used with lights, materials, and textures.

baseColorShader.description: Get the shader used when no lights or materials are applied.

baseStrokeShader.description: Get the shader used when drawing the strokes of shapes.

texture.description: Sets the texture that will be used on shapes.

textureMode.description: Changes the coordinate system used for textures when they’re applied to custom shapes.

textureWrap.description: Changes the way textures behave when a shape’s uv coordinates go beyond the texture.

normalMaterial.description: Sets the current material as a normal material.

ambientMaterial.signature: ambientMaterial(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number)
ambientMaterial.description: Sets the ambient color of shapes’ surface material.

emissiveMaterial.signature: emissiveMaterial(v1: Number, v2: Number, v3: Number, alpha?: Number)
emissiveMaterial.description: Sets the emissive color of shapes’ surface material.

specularMaterial.description: Sets the specular color of shapes’ surface material.

shininess.description: Sets the amount of gloss ("shininess") of a specularMaterial().

metalness.description: Sets the amount of "metalness" of a specularMaterial().

camera.signature: camera(x?: Number, y?: Number, z?: Number, centerX?: Number, centerY?: Number, centerZ?: Number, upX?: Number, upY?: Number, upZ?: Number)
camera.description: Sets the position and orientation of the current camera in a 3D sketch.

perspective.signature: perspective(fovy?: Number, aspect?: Number, near?: Number, far?: Number)
perspective.description: Sets a perspective projection for the current camera in a 3D sketch.

linePerspective.description: Enables or disables perspective for lines in 3D sketches.

ortho.signature: ortho(left?: Number, right?: Number, bottom?: Number, top?: Number, near?: Number, far?: Number)
ortho.description: Sets an orthographic projection for the current camera in a 3D sketch.

frustum.signature: frustum(left?: Number, right?: Number, bottom?: Number, top?: Number, near?: Number, far?: Number)
frustum.description: Sets the frustum of the current camera in a 3D sketch.

setCamera.description: Sets the current (active) camera of a 3D sketch.

setAttributes.description: Set attributes for the WebGL Drawing context.

getAudioContext.description: Returns the Audio Context for this sketch.

userStartAudio.description: It is not only a good practice to give users control over starting audio.

getOutputVolume.description: Returns a number representing the output volume for sound in this sketch.

outputVolume.signature: outputVolume(volume: Number|Object, rampTime?: Number, timeFromNow?: Number)
outputVolume.description: Scale the output of all sound in this sketch Scaled between 0.

sampleRate.description: Returns a number representing the sample rate, in samples per second, of all sound objects in this audio context.

freqToMidi.description: Returns the closest MIDI note value for a given frequency.

midiToFreq.description: Returns the frequency value of a MIDI note value.

soundFormats.description: List the SoundFile formats that you will include.

loadSound.signature: loadSound(path: String|Array, successCallback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function, whileLoading?: Function)

createConvolver.signature: createConvolver(path: String, callback?: Function, errorCallback?: Function)

setBPM.description: Set the global tempo, in beats per minute, for all p5.
